tools.name: search_icons
tools.description: Semantic icon search. Returns a 4x4 PNG grid (512x512, cells 0-15) and a mapping of cell numbers to SVG URLs.

tools.name: get_svg
tools.description: Retrieve raw SVG markup from any source. Returns the complete SVG string.

source.description: URL, Iconify ID, file path, or inline SVG

tools.name: render_grid
tools.description: Render 1-16 SVGs onto a 4x4 comparison grid (512x512, cells 0-15).
